definitions.text: A person who has reached the legal age of majority.

examples: an adult human, animal, or plant

definitions.text: Intended for or restricted to adults rather than children due to size, maturity, knowledge level, judgement, etc.
examples: adult clothes; adult cereal; an adult documentary

definitions.text: Containing situations or discussions intended primarily for adults, such as serious crime, illicit drug use, extramarital affairs, etc.
To (cause to) be or become an adult.
